rationale: Issue split + Improvement; driver wasn't wrong, spec added new authSource-without-credentials requirement.

Driver accepts batchSize in ListCollectionsOptions but silently ignores it; option accepted by API but not honored.
Memory leak in test-only code; explicitly noted as not affecting users; no spec behavior involved.

Depends on DRIVERS-1288; adding assertion to SRV+directConnection test, test infrastructure update.
